---
title: "Data-driven studies in face identity processing rely on the quality of the tests and data sets"
authors: "Bobak, A. K., Jones, A. L., Hilker, Z., Mestry, N., Bate, S., & Hancock, P. J. B."
year: 2023
date: 2023-01-01
pub-journal: "Cortex"
volume: "166"
pages: "348–364"
doi: "10.1016/j.cortex.2023.05.018"
pdf: "assets/papers/2023/bobakjones2023.pdf"
categories: [methodology]
---
